content.full_text:
March 16, 1990

Linda Monroe
Fair Political Practices Commission
425 J Street, Suite 610
Sacramento, California 95814

Dear Ms. Monroe:

The Friends of Robert Presley issued a check on March 7, 1990 to Telequery, Inc., of Sacramento in the amount of $19,200. As part of the agreement with Telequery, this $19,200 is to be remitted in full to the campaign. The campaign had been advised that this start-up money would be remitted as a result of the telemarketing effort -- in other words, from the contributions received.

The question is, on our May 22nd FPPC report, how in fact this start-up money is to be reported; i.e., as a loan, consultant services, etc......?

As we are in the process of completing this report, time is of the essence, and I would appreciate on behalf of the campaign, an expedited telephonic response, followed by, if appropriate, a letter verifying our conversation.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter. I can be reached at 714/683-6730.

Sincerely,

Judy Conover
Full Charge Bookkeeper
